titleStmt.title: SII 19.290: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 290. (A.R. No. 119 of 1929.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This registers the sale of a quarter (vēli) of land to the temple of Mahādēva, exempt from taxes like iṟai, echchōṟu, veṭṭi, vēdinai and śennīrveṭṭi, by Tōṇaṉ Ādittapiḍāraṉ of Pudukkuḍi near Karandai in Eyil-nāḍu for 15 kaḻañju of gold which was endowed to the temple for a perpetual lamp by Ūraṉ Māṟaṉ of Āyirattaḷi a resident of Aḍuppaḷḷi Niyamam in the same nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1Āvatu Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭut tiruttavat tuṟai māhādevarkku Eyiynāṭṭu
Aṭuppaḷḷi niyāmattu Āyirattaḷi Ūraṉ māṟieṉ Iravum pakalum Oru nontāttiru viḷakku nicati Uḻakku neyyāl cantrātitta
val Erivataṟku vaitta poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Iñāṭṭu karantaippaāl putukkuṭi putuk kuṭāṉ toṇan nātittapiṭāraṉa
Ippoṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcum koṇṭu Ip ponṉukku En kāṇiyil viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu kaṭippuṟattu kiḻakkaṭaiya
Iruvaravai kālc ceykku Ellai kiḻpāṟkkuellai tiṭalukku meṟkkum tenpāṟkku Ellai paḷḷattil Aṟumāvukku vaṭakkum
meṟpāṟkkuellai kāṟcceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkuellai nallimaṅkalattu toṭṭattukku teṟkkum Ivvicainta perunā
ṉkuellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi kālcceyyile Iṟaiili viṟṟu vilai yāvaṇam ceytu Innilattil vanta Iṟaiyum Ecco
ṟum veṭṭi vetiṉaiyum cennir veṭṭi Uḷppaṭṭatu Epperppaṭṭatum ceyyātitāka Iṟai Ili viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭutten Innilat
ttuk māheśvara kaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭu tān veṇṭu koviṉukkup patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu
vāṇai maṟutta Oṭampaṭṭu pinnaiyum Iñilam kāttuṭuvennānen perumānaṭika(ḷ) ḷukku putukkuṭāntāṇan Ātitta piṭāranen panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.290 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
